authors.name: Holohub Signal Detection Baselines
authors.affiliation: The University of Texas at Austin

changelog.1.0: Tuned classical power-detector baseline: windowed FFT, proper Pfa-driven CA/GO/SO CFAR on linear power (2-D reference), adaptive sigma-clipped per-bin temporal noise floor, DC notch. Stronger, task-aware counterpart to power_detection.
